memories.title: Orbit protocol upgrade: Quick Mode, Plan Checklist, Next Advisor promotion, Write-Before-Confirm
memories.abstract: Delivered 4 interconnected Orbit protocol upgrades: Quick Mode (auto-progression for simple tasks), Plan Checklist (markdown checkboxes tracked by Execute and verified by Review), Next Advisor promoted from read-only to interactive Dispatcher-level agent, and Write-Before-Confirm pattern for subagent UI transparency. 9 files modified, smoke test 47/47.
